subcodes.first_line: Say: O God, O Sovereign of Names and Creator of heaven! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which the heaven of Thy Revelation was raised up [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا مالک الاسماء و فاطر السماء اسئلک باسمک الذی به ارتفعت سماء وحیک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @prayer for nearness to God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for teaching
